hyperedges.label: Hilt DI Module Triad (Database + Repository + Settings)

nodes.label: MVVM Architecture Pattern
nodes.rationale: Each screen has a paired ViewModel annotated with @HiltViewModel. Screens receive only callbacks and state; navigation happens in WardoveNavHost. This separation keeps UI logic testable and decoupled.

nodes.label: Local-Only Data Persistence Strategy
nodes.rationale: All persistence (Room DB, images in filesDir, DataStore) is local to the app sandbox and wiped on uninstall. There is no server/cloud backend. Moving to server-side persistence is a backend project, not a config flag.

nodes.label: Version Scheme (appVersionBase + buildNumber)
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth: appVersionBase in gradle.properties holds major.minor. buildNumber is the CI run number passed via -PbuildNumber. versionName = appVersionBase.buildNumber, versionCode = 100 + buildNumber. This ensures the published release tag and APK embedded versionName always match.

nodes.label: Release Signing Strategy (stable keystore)
nodes.rationale: A changing keystore key causes App not installed errors during in-app updates. signingConfigs.release reads KEYSTORE_PATH, KEYSTORE_PASSWORD, KEY_ALIAS, KEY_PASSWORD from environment. Falls back to debug key when KEYSTORE_PATH is unset (local builds, fork PRs).

nodes.label: No Retrofit: HttpURLConnection Used Directly
nodes.rationale: UpdateRepository uses java.net.HttpURLConnection directly for the GitHub API call instead of Retrofit, keeping the dependency footprint minimal for a single API endpoint.

nodes.label: Core Library Desugaring (java.time APIs on minSdk 24)
nodes.rationale: coreLibraryDesugaringEnabled = true enables java.time APIs on Android 7.0 (minSdk 24) which natively only supports them from API 26+.
nodes.norm_label: core library desugaring (java.time apis on minsdk 24)
